creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
Make sure you follow the upgrade manual very carefully:
https://gitlab.fechner.net/mfechner/Gitlab-docu/-/blob/master/update/15.0-15.1-freebsd.md

It is importend to `pkg autoremove` and to also update the configuration files as described.

If you use pkg, pkg should handle the ruby 3.0 upgrade for you automatically. If not, make sure you read /usr/ports/UPDATING, section 20220421 and 20190420.
